parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, data: null, error: 'Unauthorized' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, message: 'Image generation workflow started' }, error: null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $json.project_id, topic_id: $json.topic_id, stage: 'images', action: $json.stopped ? 'stopped' : 'completed', details: { completed: $json.completed, failed: $json.failed, total_cost: $json.total_cost } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// No-op: assembly not claimed by this workflow (another visual workflow will fire it)
return [{ json: { message: 'Image generation complete. Assembly claimed by another workflow or not yet ready.', ...$input.first().json } }];

// No scenes to process - go directly to completion sync
return [{ json: { topic_id: $input.first().json.topic_id, project_id: null, completed: 0, failed: 0, total_cost: 0, stopped: false } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $("Check Classification").item.json.project_id, topic_id: $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.topic_id, stage: "images", action: "started", details: { model: "dual-track (fal_ai + remotion)" } }) }}
